summary: Completed testing of Partnership page CRUD, Materials edit/delete, Select dropdown fixes, and sidebar navigation. All 15 backend tests passed. All UI features verified working.
passed_tests: GET /api/reports/partnership returns partnership summary with correct structure
Partnership page loads with 3 summary cards (Chandana, Akanksha, Kshana Account)
Partnership page has tabs: Chandana, Akanksha, Kshana Account
Partnership page shows entries with edit/delete buttons
Partnership page Add Record modal opens with correct fields
Materials page has Actions column with Edit and Delete buttons
OrderForm service_type dropdown works (no empty string errors)
OrderForm gender dropdown shows 'Select gender' placeholder
Employees Add Employee modal Type dropdown works with Master/Tailor/Worker
Reports page does NOT have Partnership section (moved to separate page)
Admin sidebar has Partnership link between Reports and Gallery
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing Handshake import in AdminLayout.jsx
Fixed missing Edit and Trash2 imports in Materials.jsx
seed_data_creation: 70 partnership entries already seeded. Chandana: 26 entries (₹3,68,519), Akanksha: 24 entries (₹2,26,928), SBI: 20 entries (₹99,122). 7 materials seeded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Partnership page at /admin/partnership with full CRUD - 3 summary cards, 3 tabs, monthly breakdown table, add/edit/delete entries. 2) Materials page has Edit/Delete buttons in Actions column. 3) Select dropdown fixes applied using value={val || undefined} pattern in OrderForm (gender, service_type) and Employees (role). 4) Partnership section removed from Reports page. 5) Admin sidebar has Partnership link with Handshake icon between Reports and Gallery. Backend APIs: /api/partnership/entries (GET, POST), /api/partnership/entries/{id} (PUT, DELETE), /api/materials/{id} (PUT, DELETE).
